title: Price Schema Deep Sync Fix
changes: Separated Backpack.tf access token from Backpack.tf API key in UI and backend status.
Made Backpack API key visible in the main credential card instead of advanced-only UI.
Required price schema count > 0 before reporting Backpack.tf prices ready.
Updated Hub setup readiness so price schema absence prevents false 100% readiness.
Added explicit market scanner block reason when the Backpack API key is missing.
Bumped config.yaml, package.json, build.yaml, Dockerfiles, run.sh, frontend and runtime markers to 5.13.42.
